_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Manage cybersecurity budget, staffing, and contracting
reference_document_element_description: Manage operational budgets for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting, expenditure tracking, variance analysis, and cost optimization recommendations.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Task OP-T-009 is the strongest semantic match.
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.444). Shared vocabulary: [manage]. NICE-only terms [budget, contracting, cybersecurity, staffing] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, budgets, cost, data, expenditure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.906 (P=0.926, R=0.886). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:78.1%, C:21.8%). No dominant classification for "Manage cybersecurity budget, staffing, and contracting" vs "Manage operational budgets for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.414 ≈ STS 0.444 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [manage] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [manage]. NICE-only: [budget, contracting, cybersecurity, staffing]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, budgets, cost, data, expenditure].
